summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TICK Index and Volume Profile features. All 18 backend tests passed. All 7 frontend UI elements render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/tick-index/MNQ returns 200 status
✅ GET /api/tick-index/MNQ returns tick_index, uptick, downtick, total_trades fields
✅ GET /api/tick-index/MES returns valid data
✅ GET /api/tick-index/INVALID returns 404
✅ TICK Index sentiment is valid (STRONG_BUY/BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH/STRONG_SELL)
✅ TICK Index score is in valid range (0-1)
✅ TICK Index source is valid (databento_trades or simulated)
✅ GET /api/volume-profile/MNQ?timeframe=1H returns 200 status
✅ GET /api/volume-profile/MNQ returns poc, vah, val, profile fields
✅ GET /api/volume-profile/MES returns valid data
✅ GET /api/volume-profile/INVALID returns 404
✅ Volume Profile: VAL <= POC <= VAH (logical ordering verified: $21,891 <= $22,702 <= $23,139)
✅ Volume Profile: value_area_volume_pct is approximately 70% (actual: 70.4%)
✅ Volume Profile position is valid (ABOVE_VA/BELOW_VA/INSIDE_VA)
✅ Volume Profile has histogram data with price levels
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MNQ returns tick_index object
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MNQ returns volume_profile object
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MES returns both tick_index and volume_profile
✅ Frontend: TICK Index panel renders with data-testid='tick-index-panel'
✅ Frontend: TICK value renders with data-testid='tick-value' showing -250
✅ Frontend: Volume Profile panel renders with data-testid='volume-profile-panel'
✅ Frontend: POC box renders with data-testid='vp-poc' showing $22,702
✅ Frontend: VAH box renders with data-testid='vp-vah' showing $23,139
✅ Frontend: VAL box renders with data-testid='vp-val' showing $21,891
✅ Frontend: Volume histogram renders with data-testid='vp-histogram'
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses real DataBento OHLCV data for Volume Profile, TICK Index may use simulated data when market is closed
context_for_next_testing_agent: TICK Index and Volume Profile features fully tested. TICK Index uses DataBento trades schema (side field: A=downtick, B=uptick) with 2-min cache. When market is closed, falls back to simulated data (source='simulated'). Volume Profile uses DataBento OHLCV data with 50 price bins and 70% value area. POC=Point of Control (highest volume), VAH=Value Area High, VAL=Value Area Low. All data-testid attributes in place for automated testing.

feature_verification.tick_index_endpoint: Working - GET /api/tick-index/{symbol} returns tick_index, uptick, downtick, total_trades, sentiment, signal, score
feature_verification.tick_index_data: Working - Current values: tick_index=-250, upticks=937, downticks=1188, total=2125, source=simulated (market closed)
feature_verification.volume_profile_endpoint: Working - GET /api/volume-profile/{symbol}?timeframe=1H returns poc, vah, val, profile histogram
feature_verification.volume_profile_data: Working - Current values: POC=$22,702, VAH=$23,139, VAL=$21,891, value_area_pct=70.4%
feature_verification.analyze_integration: Working - POST /api/analyze returns both tick_index and volume_profile objects
feature_verification.frontend_tick_panel: Working - Renders with uptick/downtick bars, sentiment badge, tick value gauge
feature_verification.frontend_vp_panel: Working - Renders with VAL/POC/VAH boxes, interpretation text, volume histogram

mocked_api_note: TICK Index currently using simulated data (source='simulated') because market is closed. When market is open, source will be 'databento_trades' with real trade data.
